purpose: Food menu card with photo, bilingual names, prices.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Modern menu price card design featuring {food_item} with branded layout, item name in Arabic and English, price in SAR clearly displayed, brand color palette, clean typography hierarchy, hyper-realistic food photography integrated with menu design, no text errors {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: grow, harvest. Source code in research corpus: F04. Saudi adaptation guidance: Critical bilingual. SAR currency symbol or 'ريال' text. Saudi menu conventions: dish name both languages, description Arabic primary, price right-aligned. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 0.5 per week.
